# Attaché AI

> Stop renting AI. Start owning it. Own your AI assistant for life.

Every AI subscription resets when you close the tab. Attaché AI is different: your assistant lives on your own hardware, remembers your entire history, knows your schedule and preferences, and gets more valuable every time you use it.

## What's Included
- OpenClaw AI agent setup (fully configured)
- Remote desktop access
- Telegram integration — reach your assistant from your phone
- Voice setup — your AI makes and receives calls
- Secure payments guide
- Skill building support
- Ongoing partnership

## Pricing
- One-time setup fee: $1,999
- Bring Your Own Mac plan: $99/month
- We Handle Everything (dedicated cloud Mac Mini included): $199/month

## Key Differentiators
- You OWN your assistant — it lives on your hardware, not our servers
- Private by design — we have no access to your conversations
- Gets smarter over time — compounds in value the longer you use it
- Zero technical setup required — we build it, you use it

## Who It's For
Professionals, executives, and entrepreneurs who want the leverage of a personal assistant — without a full-time hire or months of DIY setup.

## Founded By
Robert Juul Glaesel
